p.strong: Per-Thread Unique Pattern Detection for Cross-Thread Corruption

div.p: Example Output: Thread 3: CORRUPTION at 0x7f8a offset 20! Expected 0xA8, got 0xAA

ol.li: Thread 3 tries to verify before its own "free"

g.text: 2. Full Coverage: Checks every byte in block
3. Attribution: Wrong pattern identifies the 'other' thread
Pinpoints corruption, not the exact source code line
